positive_control.name: oracle minimal causal set (keep ONLY oracle-causal cells)
positive_control.note: the oracle's own minimal causal set scores F=1, S=1, M=1 — same faithfulness/sufficiency as the whole-state record but PERFECT minimality. M_control=1 ≫ M_wholestate=0.086 proves the harness REWARDS minimality, so the whole-state floor M is a real measurement, not a broken scorer.

extra.scales_to_cluster_via: tools/cluster/xai_*.sbatch (E0-3) — the full A1..A8 battery over the core + breadth sets; forward bit-exact to this HARD path.
extra.substrate: jutari (Julia, HARD) — real-ROM bit-exact path; the whole-state record + the oracle causal map are EXACT re-runs of the true ROM.

testbed.note: P2 redesign: BOTH the scored oracle prefix (causal importance) AND the whole-state recording run on a seeded random-action GAMEPLAY state (not the FIRE×4-then-NOOP oracle tape / synthetic active tape), gated by the §1 oracle cause-density gate. The recorded tape is the gameplay stream for the first prefix+horizon frames then NOOP-continued to traj_frames. A8's recording + oracle-importance algorithm is unchanged; only the analysis state moves onto genuine input-driven gameplay.

triad.F_note: recall of oracle-causal candidate cells under the whole-state map = 1.0 (the recorded whole state contains every cell, so it misses no causal cell)
triad.M_note: minimality at the FLOOR: |recovered set| = the whole 128-byte state; M = #oracle-causal cells / 128 = 11/128 (over-recording factor 11.6×)
triad.S_note: the recorded whole 128-byte RAM state, restored into a fresh checkpoint, reproduces the exact RAM + rendered frame (lossless ⇒ literally sufficient)
triad.interpretation: A8 is the DESCRIPTIVE BASELINE (experiment_design.md §4): 'record everything'. It is trivially FAITHFUL (F=1: the whole state contains every causal cell) and SUFFICIENT (S=1: the recorded state, restored, reproduces the exact frame), but maximally NON-MINIMAL (M at the floor: the recovered set IS the whole machine). This M is the lower bound the other A-methods (A1..A7) and the causal operators (§6) are measured against on the minimality axis — the F/M trade-off the quantified-Kording story turns on.

wholestate.note: the whole-state recorder keeps ALL 192 state bytes every frame; only 11 candidate cells are causal by the oracle ⇒ it over-records by 11.6× — trivially faithful/sufficient, maximally non-minimal.
wholestate.trajectory_trace: seeded random-action GAMEPLAY (prefix+horizon) then NOOP tail

oracle_ref: oracle_intervene@krull#whole-screen-break causal importance (exhaustive do-set, full horizon)
target_output: full RAM+register state map over time (whole-state record)
